languages.original_text: "And the transience of life forms like yours leads to precious knowledge being carried off into the abyss of history yet again..."

languages.text: "И вновь недолговечность форм подобных вашей уносит в бездну истории бесценные данные..."

traits.locale_text: "И вновь недолговечность форм подобных вашей уносит в бездну истории бесценные данные..."

languages.text: "And the transience of life forms like yours leads to precious knowledge being carried off into the abyss of history yet again..."
languages.original_text: "И вновь недолговечность форм подобных вашей уносит в бездну истории бесценные данные..."

traits.locale_text: "And the transience of life forms like yours leads to precious knowledge being carried off into the abyss of history yet again..."
"And the transience of life forms like yours leads to precious knowledge being carried off into the abyss of history yet again..."
"And the transience of life forms like yours leads to precious knowledge being carried off into the abyss of history yet again..."

languages.text: “你们这种短暂的生命形式，只会让珍贵的知识再次沉入历史的深渊……”
languages.original_text: "And the transience of life forms like yours leads to precious knowledge being carried off into the abyss of history yet again..."

traits.locale_text: “你们这种短暂的生命形式，只会让珍贵的知识再次沉入历史的深渊……”

languages.text: «Y, una vez más, la transitoriedad de formas de vida como la tuya causa que un saber valioso se pierda en el abismo de la historia...».
languages.original_text: "And the transience of life forms like yours leads to precious knowledge being carried off into the abyss of history yet again..."

traits.locale_text: «Y, una vez más, la transitoriedad de formas de vida como la tuya causa que un saber valioso se pierda en el abismo de la historia...».

languages.text: « L'aspect éphémère des entités telles que vous conduit trop souvent à la disparition de précieuses connaissances dans les abîmes de l'histoire... »
languages.original_text: "And the transience of life forms like yours leads to precious knowledge being carried off into the abyss of history yet again..."

traits.locale_text: « L'aspect éphémère des entités telles que vous conduit trop souvent à la disparition de précieuses connaissances dans les abîmes de l'histoire... »

languages.text: "Senin gibi yaşam formlarının geçiciliği, değerli bilgilerin bir kez daha tarihin dipsiz çukuruna sürüklenmesine yol açıyor..."
languages.original_text: "And the transience of life forms like yours leads to precious knowledge being carried off into the abyss of history yet again..."

traits.locale_text: "Senin gibi yaşam formlarının geçiciliği, değerli bilgilerin bir kez daha tarihin dipsiz çukuruna sürüklenmesine yol açıyor..."

languages.text: "Und wieder einmal führt die Vergänglichkeit von Lebensformen wie dir dazu, dass kostbares Wissen im Abyss der Geschichte verschwindet ..."
languages.original_text: "And the transience of life forms like yours leads to precious knowledge being carried off into the abyss of history yet again..."

traits.locale_text: "Und wieder einmal führt die Vergänglichkeit von Lebensformen wie dir dazu, dass kostbares Wissen im Abyss der Geschichte verschwindet ..."

languages.text: 「そして、お前のような生命形態のはかなさゆえに、貴重な知識がまたしても歴史の深淵へと運び去られていく……」
languages.original_text: "And the transience of life forms like yours leads to precious knowledge being carried off into the abyss of history yet again..."

traits.locale_text: 「そして、お前のような生命形態のはかなさゆえに、貴重な知識がまたしても歴史の深淵へと運び去られていく……」
